positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, central composition featuring a blend of celestial elements and fantastical botanical growth. Depict intricate mandalas made of stylized crescent moons, geometric stars, interwoven bioluminescent vines, and exotic flowers. The artistic style must be a sophisticated black ink linocut print or engraving, achieving extreme contrast and clean, distinct silhouettes. Focus on flat graphic design, ornamental detail, and a balanced, repeating pattern structure. High resolution, vector illustration quality, sharp lines, suitable for apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, watermark, signature, text, logo, photograph, gradient, messy, grainy, noise, poor symmetry
